action_text: Press Escape to close the open search-context popover
rationale: The “Choose search context” popover is likely blocking interactions with the list filter; closing it will let me use the list’s filter to find the report.

action_text: Click the global search magnifier to close the context popover
rationale: Clicking the magnifier should toggle/close the search-context popover so I can interact with the list controls.

action_text: Click the “Reports” header area to dismiss the popover
rationale: Clicking on a neutral area (the Reports header) should dismiss the popover and return focus to the list.

action_text: Click the Show/Hide filter icon on the report list
rationale: Once the popover is dismissed, enabling the list filter will allow me to search by Title for “Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the report list by title
rationale: Sorting by Title can help quickly locate a report named “Incidents by agent” if filtering is not yet available.
